Vel'Koz.trading_pattern: Vel'Koz outranges you. Farm safely, use W poke.
Vel'Koz.mid_game: Use ult to negate his engage. Poke back.
Vel'Koz.win_condition: Negate his poke with ult. Win through teamfights.
Vel'Koz.scaling: Vel'Koz outscales — his poke is oppressive

Anivia.trading_pattern: Anivia has poke and CC. Trade when Q down.
Anivia.mid_game: Use ult to escape. Poke back.
Anivia.win_condition: Use ult defensively. Win through teamfights.
Anivia.scaling: Anivia outscales — her wall dominates late

Aurelion Sol.trading_pattern: Aurelion Sol pushes and roams better. Farm safely.
Aurelion Sol.ability_to_dodge: Aurelion Sol W — stay at range.
Aurelion Sol.mid_game: Use ult defensively. Scale with team.
Aurelion Sol.win_condition: Use ult defensively. Group for teamfights.
Aurelion Sol.scaling: Aurelion Sol outscales — roaming impact dominates

Annie.trading_pattern: Annie has burst. Trade when stun down.
Annie.mid_game: Use ult to escape Tibbers. Poke back.
Annie.win_condition: Use ult defensively. Win through teamfights.
Annie.scaling: Vex outscales — your mobility beats her burst

Vladimir.trading_pattern: Vladimir weak early. Use W poke and control.
Vladimir.ability_to_dodge: Vladimir Q — stay out of range.
Vladimir.early_game: Abuse with W poke. Control lane.
Vladimir.mid_game: Poke and scale. Use ult for defense.
Vladimir.win_condition: Get early advantage. Win before he scales.
Vladimir.scaling: Vladimir outscales — his teamfight dominates late
Vladimir.positioning: Use W to poke. Keep distance from Q.

Nasus.scaling: Nasus significantly outscales — you need major lead

Irelia.scaling: Vex outscales — your mobility beats her all-in

Mel.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
